Player Ship Profile

EnginePlayer Assassin
Default weapons2
Base techs4
Special traits4
Base health6
Base shield6
Base shield regen5
Base armor4

The ship is delivered with a super charged engine.

Equipped with a ship specific cloaking device that is not possible copy to other ships.

Ship Stats

Known hangars11

Default Weapons

WeaponStart levelSlotType
Shadowflame01blaster
Cloaking Device02cloak

Default Upgrades

TechStart levelWhat it gives
Shield0Increases shield amount and regeneration rate. - Can block heavy hits. - Shield Bonuses scale with player level. Good vs hard hitting weapons.
Armor0Increases health and armor amount. Armor reduces damage by its value per hit. - Can restore health. - armor bonuses scale with player level. Good vs fast hitting weapons.
Engine6Increases acceleration and speed. - Can boost speed. Good in PvP.
Power6Increases power regeneration and maximum power. - Can boost damage output at the cost of power. Good for dealing more damage for longer periods.

TraitBonus
Energy damage100%
Cooldown efficiency100%
Speed160%
Max power-20%
